scope: BrapiMarketDataProvider with optional token, timeout, https/loopback base validation, ticker allowlist, URL encoding, symbol matching, and allowlisted raw payload
refresh cooldown per user and asset
shared mock HTTP test helper using ephemeral loopback ports, docs, and env examples
residualRisk: Approved with risk: the independent reviewer first found five actionable issues and the final pass confirmed they were resolved: ticker allowlist and URL encoding, refresh cooldown per user and asset, returned symbol matching before persistence, https-only provider base except loopback tests, and allowlisted raw payload without token/header. Remaining deterministic signals are accepted as false positives or bounded warnings: loopback literals are used only for ephemeral local tests, provider Authorization header is constructed from env/config and not persisted, DTO validation is implemented through explicit parsers, the controller calls requireAuthenticatedUser, docs cover the endpoint instead of OpenAPI decorators, and HTTP integration tests exercise real Nest routes on ephemeral ports.
